rationale: The citation is used in the Study 4 methods to justify how the authors manipulate promotion versus prevention framing in the appeal text. This is not just background name-dropping; it supports a concrete design choice used to test their proposed mechanism. Although it is grouped with another source, the functional role is clear: prior regulatory-focus framing work is being carried into this experiment.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Wang and Lee (2006) as precedent for constructing promotion versus prevention message framing. It transfers that framing approach to a charitable-donation context to test how norm deviations interact with self-construal.
